Class ControllerForum

java.lang.Object
guiForum.ControllerForum
public class ControllerForum extends Object
Provides controller actions for the forum user interface.

This class contains event-handling methods for actions such as logging out of the forum view and terminating the application.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ControllerForum()
    Creates a forum controller.

  • Method Details

    • performAddPost

      protected static void performAddPost()

      Directs user to add post window

    • performReadSpecificPost

      protected static void performReadSpecificPost(CRUD.Post post)

      Opens detail of specific post

      Parameters:
      post - that user want to read

    • performEditPost

      protected static void performEditPost(CRUD.Post post)

      Directs user to edit post window

      Parameters:
      post - is being edited

    • performDeletePost

      protected static void performDeletePost(CRUD.Post post)

      Verifies users on post deletion

      Parameters:
      post - is being deleted

    • performSearchButton

      protected static void performSearchButton(String keyword, String thread)

      Updates post list whenever an user search for specific keyword or thread or both

      Parameters:
      keyword - is text that user want to find in title or content
      thread - is post thread

    • performClearButton

      protected static void performClearButton()

      Updates post list to all posts in the database

    • performAddReply

      protected static String performAddReply(int postId, String author, String content)

      Performs action when reply button is clicked

      Parameters:
      postId - is the id of the post to be replied
      author - is an author's reply
      content - is reply's content
      Returns:
      a String represents error message, empty if there is no error

    • performEditReply

      protected static void performEditReply(CRUD.Reply reply)

      Directs user to edit reply window

      Parameters:
      reply - is being edited

    • performDeleteReply

      protected static void performDeleteReply(CRUD.Reply reply)

      Verifies users on reply deletion

      Parameters:
      reply - is being deleted

    • performLogout

      protected static void performLogout()
      Logs the current user out of the forum and returns to the login screen.

    • performQuit

      protected static void performQuit()
      Terminates execution of the application.
